# Noval Abdillah - Full Stack SaaS Developer

Professional portfolio of Noval Abdillah, a Full Stack Software Engineer specializing in Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase, and AI-assisted engineering.

## Core Capabilities
- **SaaS Architecture:** Designing robust and secure authentication flows (JWT/RBAC), database schemas, and integration with Stripe.
- **Frontend Engineering:** Creating performant, interactive, and responsive user interfaces with Tailwind CSS, GSAP, and Lenis.
- **AI-Assisted Development:** Accelerating development workflows using AI orchestrations without compromising design patterns or security.

## Core Stack
- Next.js (App Router)
- React 19
- TypeScript
- Node.js
- PostgreSQL
- Supabase SSR & Database
- GSAP, Lenis, Tailwind CSS

## Key Pages
- [/] - Main landing page showing featured projects and latest insights.
- [/about] - Detailed profile, technical certifications (Google AI, GitHub Copilot Applied Skills), and professional background.
- [/projects] - Portfolio of SaaS applications, MVPs, and full-stack projects.
- [/blog] - Articles sharing engineering insights, Supabase SSR authentication guides, and web animation tutorials.
- [/contact] - Direct channel for collaboration inquiries.
